final:
module top_module (
	input clk,
	input in_signal,
	output reg edge_detected);reg prev_signal;

always @(posedge clk) begin
		prev_signal <= in_signal;
		edge_detected <= (in_signal & ~prev_signal);
	end
	
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (in_signal & prev_signal) begin
        edge_detected <= 1'b0;
      end else if (~in_signal & ~prev_signal) begin
        edge_detected <= 1'b1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
